changelog:
Manga & Improvements
- Added Manga support with offline downloads (English only)
- Added English 1 source (Hardsubs)
- Optimized download engine (up to 5x faster)

Android TV Upgrades
- Added AniList/MAL account syncing via QR code
- New UI redesign and improved remote navigation
- Added 3 new content sections to home screen

Fixes & Adjustments
- Fixed Continue Watching loop and audio dub options
- Fixed AniList/MAL syncing errors and TV crashes
- Manage anime status directly inside the app
